subject: [syzbot ci] Re: mm: switch THP shrinker to list_lru

reviews.author: Johannes Weiner
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about list_lru_lock() being called on a nid+memcg combination without allocated heads, suggesting either failure or page type filtering in __folio_freeze_and_split_unmapped(). Also mentioned the need for a separate lockdep key for deferred_split_lru.

2026-03-13.patch_summary: Proposal to switch THP shrinker to list_lru
